title: BEM-598 role to internal
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
role_inbox=Path('governance/role_orchestrator/inbox'); role_inbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
internal_inbox=Path('governance/internal_contour/inbox'); internal_inbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
internal_tasks=Path('governance/internal_contour/tasks'); internal_tasks.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending'); pending.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_path=Path('governance/state/role_orchestrator_internal_router_state.json'); state_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

protocol=protocols/'ROLE_ORCHESTRATOR_INTERNAL_ROUTER.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-598 | Role Orchestrator To Internal Contour Router'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:58 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Назначение'+sep+sep+'Маршрутизировать machine-readable решения из `governance/role_orchestrator/inbox/` во внутренний контур.'+sep+sep+'## Поток'+sep+sep+'role_orchestrator/inbox -> internal_contour/inbox -> internal_contour/tasks -> analyst/auditor/executor cycle.'+sep+sep+'## Правило'+sep+sep+'Решение оператора не должно зависать в role-orchestrator. Оно должно превращаться в задачу внутреннего контура.'+sep)

script=scripts/'role_orchestrator_internal_router.py'
source=[
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'SEP = bytes.fromhex("0a").decode("ascii")',
'ROLE_INBOX = Path("governance/role_orchestrator/inbox")',
'INTERNAL_INBOX = Path("governance/internal_contour/inbox")',
'INTERNAL_TASKS = Path("governance/internal_contour/tasks")',
'PENDING_DIR = Path("governance/tasks/pending")',
'STATE_PATH = Path("governance/state/role_orchestrator_internal_router_state.json")',
'TRANSPORT_PATH = Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl")',
'REPORT_PATH = Path("governance/reports/role_orchestrator_internal_router_result.md")',
'def load_json(path, default):',
'    if path.exists():',
'        try:',
'            return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'        except Exception:',
'            return default',
'    return default',
'def save_json(path, obj):',
'    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    path.write_text(json.dumps(obj, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'def append_jsonl(path, record):',
'    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:',
'        handle.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP)',
'def make_internal_job(path, package):',
'    decision_id = str(package.get("decision_id") or path.stem)',
'    selected = package.get("selected_option") or package.get("operator_choice")',
'    job = {',
'        "schema_version": "internal_contour_intake.v1",',
'        "record_type": "operator_decision_internal_task",',
'        "decision_id": decision_id,',
'        "source_file": str(path),',
'        "from_role": "role_orchestrator",',
'        "to_role": "analyst",',
'        "status": "ready_for_internal_contour",',
'        "task_type": "apply_operator_decision",',
'        "summary": "Apply operator decision to system canon and implementation",',
'        "operator_choice": package.get("operator_choice"),',
'        "selected_option": selected,',
'        "question": package.get("question"),',
'        "acceptance_criteria": [',
'            "Canonical protocol updated",',
'            "Runtime renderer follows selected operator decision format",',
'            "Routine mailbox does not notify Telegram",',
'            "Operator decision uses structured package only",',
'            "Evidence recorded in reports and transport",',
'        ],',
'        "roles": {"curator":"gpt", "analyst":"gpt", "auditor":"claude", "executor":"claude_or_python_executor"},',
'        "created_at": "workflow_runtime",',
'        "payload": package,',
'    }',
'    return decision_id, job',
'state = load_json(STATE_PATH, {})',
'processed = set(state.get("processed_role_packages", []))',
'ROLE_INBOX.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'INTERNAL_INBOX.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'INTERNAL_TASKS.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'PENDING_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'created = []',
'for path in sorted(ROLE_INBOX.glob("*.json"), key=lambda p: str(p)):',
'    if str(path) in processed:',
'        continue',
'    package = load_json(path, {})',
'    decision_id, job = make_internal_job(path, package)',
'    inbox_file = INTERNAL_INBOX / ("operator_decision_" + decision_id + ".json")',
'    task_file = INTERNAL_TASKS / ("operator_decision_" + decision_id + ".json")',
'    pending_file = PENDING_DIR / ("internal_contour_operator_decision_" + decision_id + ".md")',
'    save_json(inbox_file, job)',
'    save_json(task_file, job)',
'    pending_file.write_text("# Internal Contour Task | Operator Decision" + SEP + SEP + "Decision: " + decision_id + SEP + "Selected: " + str(job.get("selected_option")) + SEP + "Next role: Analyst" + SEP + SEP + "Goal: apply selected operator decision format to canon and runtime implementation." + SEP + SEP + "Blocker: null" + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'    append_jsonl(TRANSPORT_PATH, job)',
'    created.append({"inbox": str(inbox_file), "task": str(task_file), "pending": str(pending_file)})',
'    processed.add(str(path))',
'state["processed_role_packages"] = sorted(processed)',
'state["last_run"] = {"created": created, "count": len(created), "status": "completed", "blocker": None}',
'save_json(STATE_PATH, state)',
'REPORT_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'report = ["# BEM-598 | Role Orchestrator Internal Router Result", "", "Дата: workflow_runtime", "", "## Created", json.dumps(created, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), "", "## Blocker", "null"]',
'REPORT_PATH.write_text(SEP.join(report) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'print(json.dumps(state["last_run"], ensure_ascii=False))',
]
script.write_text(sep.join(source)+sep)

workflow=wfs/'role-orchestrator-internal-router.yml'
workflow.write_text('''name: Role Orchestrator Internal Router

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/role_orchestrator/inbox/**'
      - 'scripts/role_orchestrator_internal_router.py'
      - '.github/workflows/role-orchestrator-internal-router.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: role-orchestrator-internal-router
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  route-role-orchestrator:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check internal router
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/role_orchestrator_internal_router.py

      - name: Route role orchestrator inbox to internal contour
        run: python3 scripts/role_orchestrator_internal_router.py

      - name: Commit internal route result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/role_orchestrator_internal_router_state.json governance/internal_contour governance/tasks/pending governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/reports/role_orchestrator_internal_router_result.md
          git commit -m "BEM-598 role orchestrator internal route result" || echo "No changes"
          git pull --rebase origin main || git rebase --abort || true
          git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)
''')

# Force-route existing role inbox now, not waiting for workflow.
processed=[]
created=[]
for path in sorted(role_inbox.glob('*.json'), key=lambda p: str(p)):
    try: package=json.loads(path.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: package={}
    decision_id=str(package.get('decision_id') or path.stem)
    selected=package.get('selected_option') or package.get('operator_choice')
    job={'schema_version':'internal_contour_intake.v1','record_type':'operator_decision_internal_task','decision_id':decision_id,'source_file':str(path),'from_role':'role_orchestrator','to_role':'analyst','status':'ready_for_internal_contour','task_type':'apply_operator_decision','summary':'Apply operator decision to system canon and implementation','operator_choice':package.get('operator_choice'),'selected_option':selected,'question':package.get('question'),'acceptance_criteria':['Canonical protocol updated','Runtime renderer follows selected operator decision format','Routine mailbox does not notify Telegram','Operator decision uses structured package only','Evidence recorded in reports and transport'],'roles':{'curator':'gpt','analyst':'gpt','auditor':'claude','executor':'claude_or_python_executor'},'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:58 (UTC+3)','payload':package}
    inbox_file=internal_inbox/('operator_decision_'+decision_id+'.json')
    task_file=internal_tasks/('operator_decision_'+decision_id+'.json')
    pending_file=pending/('internal_contour_operator_decision_'+decision_id+'.md')
    inbox_file.write_text(json.dumps(job,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    task_file.write_text(json.dumps(job,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    pending_file.write_text('# Internal Contour Task | Operator Decision'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision_id+sep+'Selected: '+str(selected)+sep+'Next role: Analyst'+sep+sep+'Goal: apply selected operator decision format to canon and runtime implementation.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
    with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(job,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created.append({'inbox':str(inbox_file),'task':str(task_file),'pending':str(pending_file)})
    processed.append(str(path))
state_path.write_text(json.dumps({'processed_role_packages':processed,'last_run':{'created':created,'count':len(created),'status':'completed','blocker':None},'updated_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:58 (UTC+3)'},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

report=reports/'bem598_role_orchestrator_to_internal.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-598 | Role Orchestrator To Internal | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:58 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Implemented and force-ran router from role_orchestrator inbox to internal contour inbox/tasks.'+sep+sep+'Created: '+json.dumps(created,ensure_ascii=False)+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem598_role_orchestrator_to_internal','cycle_id':'bem598-role-orchestrator-to-internal','source':'gpt','status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'script':str(script),'created':created,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:58 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem598_role_orchestrator_to_internal']={'status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'script':str(script),'created':created,'blocker':None}
state['operator_decision_internal_contour_handoff']='completed'
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 22:58 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem598_role_orchestrator_to_internal.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-598 PASS: role_orchestrator inbox routed to internal contour inbox/tasks.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(script),str(workflow),str(state_path),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
changed_files.extend([item['inbox'] for item in created]+[item['task'] for item in created]+[item['pending'] for item in created])
ops_applied.append('Implemented and force-ran role_orchestrator inbox to internal_contour inbox/tasks route')
"""
No issue comments.
